hero_subtitle: SFTY Government connects fragmented digital asset data into secure workflows that preserve audit trails and support defensible regulatory decisions for public authorities.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervisory workflows stall with incomplete evidence
problem_description: Regulators struggle to form a clear operating view when supervisory data remains dispersed across multiple sources and providers. This fragmentation slows decision-making, complicates auditability, and reduces confidence in regulatory actions and reporting.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY connects licensing data, provider outputs, wallet and transaction signals, cases and evidence into a single secure workflow that supports audit-ready supervisory decisions and regulatory reporting.
workflow_title: From market signal to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY connects fragmented market data through alerts, cases, evidence collection and supervisory decisions to support regulated authority workflows and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY brings together fragmented market signals, entity data, cases and evidence into one secure operating layer designed for institutional digital asset supervision.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY provides regulators with a secure, access-controlled platform designed for evidence preservation, auditability, and phased deployment in government-grade environments.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support secure supervisory workflows and evidence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY preserves evidence and audit-ready decision logs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how case workflows connect licensing and supervisory actions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe role-based access and secure deployment for regulators
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for regulators and authorities?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides regulators a secure supervisory layer connecting VASP, CASP, licensing, wallets, transactions, KYC/KYB, Travel Rule, cases and reports for structured, evidence-based digital asset oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support VASP supervision workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures signals from wallet activity, licensing records, Travel Rule data and alerts into cases and decision workflows, supporting risk-based supervision and investigation lifecycle management for VASPs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed case history, decision logs, linked evidence and audit trails to support supervisory records remain accessible, reviewable and defensible under regulatory requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider outputs?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY operates as a neutral layer that normalizes and connects outputs from KYT, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and blockchain analytics providers into a connected supervisory environment.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing analytics tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but enhances supervision by turning their outputs into structured workflows, audit-ready evidence and integrated reporting within a controlled governance framework.
final_title: Review secure supervisory governance with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY structures regulatory workflows, access controls, evidence logs and multi-provider orchestration for public authorities.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
